title: Case Converter
desc: Convert any text to uppercase, lowercase, title case, sentence case, and more.

title: Coin Flipper
desc: Flip a coin and let chance decide. Heads or tails.

title: Countdown Timer
desc: Set a countdown to any date or time and watch it tick down in real time.

title: Dice Roller
desc: Roll any number of dice with different sides — D4, D6, D8, D12, D20 and more.

title: Password Generator
desc: Generate strong, random passwords with custom length and character rules.

title: QR Code Generator
desc: Turn any URL or text into a scannable QR code instantly.

title: Random Name Picker
desc: Enter a list of names and pick one at random — great for raffles and classroom draws.

title: Random Number Generator
desc: Generate a random number within any range, with an optional no-duplicates mode.

title: Stopwatch
desc: A clean stopwatch with lap tracking and split times.

title: Team Randomizer
desc: Split a list of names into balanced random teams in one click.

title: Unit Converter
desc: Convert between units of length, weight, and temperature with a live result.

title: Decision Wheel
desc: Add your options, spin the wheel, and let it choose for you.

title: Word Counter
desc: Count words, characters, sentences, and reading time as you type.

title: World Clock
desc: See the current time across multiple time zones at a glance.
